meta.name: Swapnil Pharate
meta.title: Data Engineer & AI Engineer
meta.subtitle: Python · PySpark · AWS · LLMs · RAG · GenAi.AgenticAi
meta.tagline: Building reliable data pipelines, ETL migration tools, and production-grade AI systems.

about.bio: I'm Swapnil — a Data Engineer & AI Engineer with nearly 3 years of hands-on experience building scalable ETL pipelines, PySpark transformations, and AWS-native data infrastructure. I've also dived deep into AI Engineering — building LLM-powered tools, RAG systems, and agentic workflows using Amazon Bedrock. I love bridging traditional data engineering with cutting-edge AI to create systems that are fast, reliable, and intelligent.

bullets: Designed and built end-to-end ETL pipelines processing 80K+ JSON files weekly with 100% accuracy and 50% faster processing via parallel execution.
Developed an Informatica → PySpark automated conversion tool, dramatically reducing manual migration time and errors.
Architected serverless orchestration using AWS Step Functions and Lambda, integrating Amazon Bedrock (Claude) for AI-powered test case generation.
Built automated data validation frameworks that reduced manual testing by 80% and sped up integrity checks by 70%.
Optimized Athena queries via partitioning and compression; collaborated with data scientists on ML-ready datasets.
Built RAG-based internal knowledge assistant using Amazon Bedrock and Streamlit for engineering teams.

projects.title: Advanced Load Forecasting (ALF)
projects.description: Scalable ETL pipeline processing 80K+ JSON files weekly. 100% accuracy, 50% speed gain via parallel execution. Partitioned Athena queries for downstream ML forecasting.

projects.title: NextGenGIS Data Product
projects.description: Automated testing framework cutting manual validation by 80%. Serverless Step Functions + Lambda orchestration. AI-agentic feedback loop via Amazon Bedrock syncing with Jira.

projects.title: Informatica → PySpark Converter
projects.description: Automated ETL migration tool parsing Informatica XML workflows and generating production-ready PySpark code. Enforces Pylint + Black standards.

projects.title: RAG-Powered Doc Assistant
projects.description: Agentic AI assistant built on Amazon Bedrock that indexes pipeline documentation and answers engineering queries using Retrieval-Augmented Generation.

projects.title: Streamlit File Manager IDE
projects.description: Browser-based file manager and code editor for data files. Lets non-technical stakeholders browse, preview, and validate datasets without CLI.

projects.title: Automated Data Testing Framework
projects.description: Custom Python framework validating ETL transformations at scale. Compares source/target datasets, generates diff reports, flags anomalies — integrated in CI.
